|| `schema` | **Type**: `NYT::TIntrusivePtr<NYT::NTableClient::TTableSchema>`
**Required parameter**
Stream schema. It is a dynamic table schema. Cannot contain sorting or computed columns.

We recommend making schema changes by completely stopping the pipeline. In this case, no `output` messages remain inside the pipeline. ||
|| `migration_function` | **Type**: `std::string`
**Default value**: `NYT::NFlow::DefaultMigrationFunction`
 ||
